# komodo_stack (Action)

Invokes any action that belongs to a Komodo stack resource. Set `action` to select the operation: `deploy`, `deploy_if_changed`, `destroy`, `pause`, `unpause`, `pull`, `restart`, `run_service`, `start`, or `stop`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "komodo_stack" "example" {
  name      = "nginx"
  server_id = komodo_servers.main.example.id

  compose {
    contents = <<-EOT
      services:
        nginx:
          image: nginx:latest
          ports:
            - "80:80"
          restart: unless-stopped
    EOT
  }

  lifecycle {
    action_trigger {
      events = [
        after_create,
        after_update,
      ]
      actions = [
        action.komodo_stack.deploy
      ]
    }
  }
}

# Deploy the stack whenever it is created or updated.
action "komodo_stack" "deploy" {
  config {
    id     = komodo_stack.example.id
    action = "deploy"
  }
}

# Destroy a specific service within the stack on-demand.
action "komodo_stack" "destroy" {
  config {
    id             = komodo_stack.example.id
    action         = "destroy"
    services       = ["nginx"]
    remove_orphans = true
  }
}

# Run a one-off command inside the nginx service container.
action "komodo_stack" "run_service" {
  config {
    id      = komodo_stack.example.id
    action  = "run_service"
    service = "nginx"
    command = ["nginx", "-t"]
    detach  = false
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) The stack operation to perform. Valid values: `deploy`, `deploy_if_changed`, `destroy`, `pause`, `unpause`, `pull`, `restart`, `run_service`, `start`, `stop`.
- `id` (String) The ID of the target stack.

### Optional

- `command` (List of String) Command and arguments to pass to the container. Applies to: `run_service`.
- `detach` (Boolean) Detach container after run. Applies to: `run_service`.
- `entrypoint` (String) Override the container entrypoint. Applies to: `run_service`.
- `env` (Map of String) Extra environment variables for the container. Applies to: `run_service`.
- `no_deps` (Boolean) Do not start linked services. Applies to: `run_service`.
- `no_tty` (Boolean) Do not allocate a TTY. Applies to: `run_service`.
- `pull` (Boolean) Pull the image before running. Applies to: `run_service`.
- `remove_orphans` (Boolean) Pass `--remove-orphans` to docker compose down. Applies to: `destroy`.
- `service` (String) Service to run a one-off command against. Required when `action` is `run_service`.
- `service_ports` (Boolean) Map service ports to the host. Applies to: `run_service`.
- `services` (List of String) Filter to specific services. Applies to: `deploy`, `destroy`, `pause`, `unpause`, `pull`, `restart`, `start`, `stop`. If empty, all services are targeted.
- `stop_time` (Number) Override the default termination max time in seconds. Applies to: `deploy`, `deploy_if_changed`, `destroy`, `stop`.
- `user` (String) User to run as inside the container. Applies to: `run_service`.
- `workdir` (String) Working directory inside the container. Applies to: `run_service`.
